case_title: JIN-KAI ZHONG VS. HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHONG, JIN-KAI AS TO DEFENDANT HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP YING, LI EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHUNHUA, XIAN EACH INDIVIDULLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHONG, JIN-KAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP YING, LI EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHUNHUA, XIAN EACH INDIVIDULLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF HOME SOLUTION COMPANY, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $5,055.51 PRINCIPAL, $39.30 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,274.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
